opportunities.title: Initial server response time was short

seoChecks.label: Title tag
seoChecks.description: The title gives screen reader users an overview of the page, and search engine users rely on it heavily to determine if a page is relevant to their search. [Learn more about document titles](https://dequeuniversity.com/rules/axe/4.12/document-title).

seoChecks.label: Meta description
seoChecks.description: Meta descriptions may be included in search results to concisely summarize page content. [Learn more about the meta description](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/seo/meta-description/).

seoChecks.label: Canonical tag
seoChecks.description: Canonical links suggest which URL to show in search results. [Learn more about canonical links](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/seo/canonical/).

seoChecks.label: hreflang
seoChecks.description: hreflang links tell search engines what version of a page they should list in search results for a given language or region. [Learn more about `hreflang`](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/seo/hreflang/).

seoChecks.label: Page is crawlable
seoChecks.description: Search engines are unable to include your pages in search results if they don't have permission to crawl them. [Learn more about crawler directives](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/seo/is-crawlable/).

seoChecks.label: robots.txt valid
seoChecks.description: If your robots.txt file is malformed, crawlers may not be able to understand how you want your website to be crawled or indexed. [Learn more about robots.txt](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/seo/invalid-robots-txt/).

seoChecks.label: Crawlable links
seoChecks.description: Search engines may use `href` attributes on links to crawl websites. Ensure that the `href` attribute of anchor elements links to an appropriate destination, so more pages of the site can be discovered. [Learn how to make links crawlable](https://support.google.com/webmasters/answer/9112205)

seoChecks.label: Descriptive link text
seoChecks.description: Descriptive link text helps search engines understand your content. [Learn how to make links more accessible](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/seo/link-text/).

seoChecks.label: Structured data
seoChecks.description: Run the [Structured Data Testing Tool](https://developers.google.com/search/docs/appearance/structured-data/) to validate structured data. [Learn more about Structured Data](https://developer.chrome.com/docs/lighthouse/seo/structured-data/).
